concept: Players assume roles as either "Crewmates" or "Impostors" aboard a spaceship, with Crewmates attempting to complete various mini-game tasks across the map while Impostors secretly sabotage systems and eliminate Crewmates. The core gameplay revolves around social deduction: Crewmates win by completing all tasks or ejecting all Impostors through voting, while Impostors win by killing enough Crewmates to achieve numerical parity or by successfully executing critical sabotages.
name: Among Us!
